\tzpentry{ID4353}{Mass Ratio Eff Lum Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4353 introduces Mass Ratio Eff Lum Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \label{eq:mass-ratio} \frac{M_{\text{eff}}}{M_{\text{lum}}} ;=; \frac{\hat{\alpha}{\text{obs}}}{\hat{\alpha}{\text{lum}}},. \end{equation}
